caption: The video features a woman seated against a black background, engaging in what appears to be a lecture or presentation. She is wearing glasses and a light green top with floral embroidery around the neckline. A microphone is clipped to her clothing, indicating that she is speaking into it. Her hands are animated as she gestures, suggesting that she is explaining or emphasizing a point. The setting is simple and professional, likely intended to focus the viewer's attention on her speech and gestures. The logo "NPTEL" in the bottom left corner suggests that this is an educational video, possibly part of a series or course offered by the National Programme on Technology Enhanced Learning.
